column5: These are the films that have influenced me throughout my life, from the ages of 0 to today. I consider them to be my most rewatchable films of all time.  I’m sure this list will change, but this is it right now. And yes, LOTR is one movie. No question.

column2: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
